text: 新たに誕生する「アークス」よ。
今から諸君は、広大な宇宙へと第一歩を踏み出す。
覚悟を決め、各々のパーソナルデータを入力せよ。
Greetings ARKS recruits, you have done well.
You now stand poised to take your first steps into the vast frontier of space.
If you're prepared to face the challenge of the unknown, enter your personal data.
Then, from all of us, welcome aboard.
